summary: Re-verified Emergent branding removal on /login and /dashboard. Badge is a plain DIV with 'Made with ❤', no href, no svg/img, no external emergent-main.js script, title is 'AccountantOS | Accounting Operations Platform'. Verified persistence 5+ seconds after load and after login.
test_credentials: admin@accountantos.ch / Admin123! - login works, redirects to /dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: /login and /dashboard both show #emergent-badge as DIV tag, no href, no svg/img child, innerText 'Made with ❤'. document.title = 'AccountantOS | Accounting Operations Platform'. No script tag with 'emergent-main.js' present in DOM. Clicking badge did not navigate. Verified 5+ seconds after load - no re-injection.
rca of the issue: Fixed: removal of external emergent-main.js script from index.html plus persistent MutationObserver enforcer prevents any re-injection of Emergent logo/link.
